---
title: A title
subtitle: A subtitle
format: clean-typst
author:
  - name: Your Name
    email: 000000@gsuite.kobe-u.ac.jp
    affiliations: 神戸大学
date: today
date-format: long
brand:
  typography: 
    fonts: 
      - family: Noto Sans JP
        weight: [100, 200, 300, 400, 500, 600, 700]
        style: [normal, italic]
        source: google
    base: Noto Sans JP
    headings: Noto Sans JP
---
